svg.aria-label: An envelope follower tracing a burst
svg.title: An envelope follower tracing a burst
svg.desc: The magnitude of a quiet-loud-quiet tone, drawn as a filled region, and the one-pole envelope that follows it: the envelope rises with the burst in about 5 ms (attack) and decays after it in about 50 ms (release). It rides below the crests, because each crest lasts an instant while the attack spans several. Linear amplitude, not dB.
svg.text: input magnitude |x| — what the follower chases
